title: plantago major f. yezomaritima
intro: Plantago major f. yezomaritima, also known as Japanese ribwort or Yezo plantain, is a subspecies of the greater plantain (Plantago major) native to Japan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Plantago major f. yezomaritima include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Japanese herbal medicine, known as kampo.
